validation.target_repo_note: User supplied wolfssl-main, but that path did not exist. Audited existing repository D:\project\conditionFuzzing\wolfssl-master.

results.change_condition: As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, for KeyUpdate
results.change_action: must be present / must be sent as acknowledgement
results.standard_evidence: As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, KeyUpdates MUST be acknowledged.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：As with other handshake messages with no built-in response, KeyUpdates MUST be acknowledged. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: IANA allocation for the ACK message
results.change_action: set to constant
results.standard_evidence: IANA has allocated the content type value 26 in the "TLS ContentType" registry for the ACK message
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：IANA has allocated the content type value 26 in the "TLS ContentType" registry for the ACK message 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: If the implementation has received one or more ACKs from the peer in the SENDING state
results.change_action: must be used to judge acknowledged messages or message fragments; acknowledged ones SHOULD be omitted from transmission
results.standard_evidence: If the implementation has received one or more ACKs (see Section 7) from the peer, then it SHOULD omit any messages or message fragments which have already been acknowledged.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：If the implementation has received one or more ACKs (see Section 7) from the peer, then it SHOULD omit any messages or message fragments which have already been acknowledged. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: In the illustrated handshake after the client sends Certificate, CertificateVerify, and Finished
results.change_action: set to acknowledge record 2
results.related_state_or_step: example handshake with timeout and retransmission; Record 5 from server
results.standard_evidence:
<--------               Record 5
                                                       ACK [2]
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary:
要求：<--------               Record 5
                                                       ACK [2] 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: In the illustrated handshake, the client can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys
results.change_action: set to empty
results.related_state_or_step: example handshake with timeout and retransmission; Record 1 from client
results.standard_evidence:
the client sends an empty ACK message because it can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys... Record 1                  -------->
    ACK []
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary:
要求：the client sends an empty ACK message because it can only acknowledge Record 2 sent by the server once it has processed messages in Record 0 needed to establish epoch 2 keys... Record 1                  -------->
    ACK [] 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight
results.change_action: validated value check: ACK must indicate a complete flight; cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED
results.standard_evidence: Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight, the implementation cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Upon receiving an ACK for a complete flight, the implementation cancels all retransmissions and either remains in WAITING, or, if the ACK was for the final flight, transitions to FINISHED. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: Upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight
results.change_action: validated value check: ACK must indicate a partial flight; retransmit the unacknowledged portion of the flight
results.standard_evidence: upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight (as mentioned in Section 7.1), the implementation transitions to the SENDING state, where it retransmits the unacknowledged portion of the flight
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：upon receiving an ACK for a partial flight (as mentioned in Section 7.1), the implementation transitions to the SENDING state, where it retransmits the unacknowledged portion of the flight 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: When an implementation receives an ACK
results.change_action: must be treated as acknowledging records that appear in it
results.standard_evidence: Implementations MUST treat a record as having been acknowledged if it appears in any ACK;
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Implementations MUST treat a record as having been acknowledged if it appears in any ACK; 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: When in the FINISHED state, for at least twice the default MSL, if the server receives retransmission of the client's final flight
results.change_action: set to retransmit of its ACK
results.standard_evidence: when in the FINISHED state, the server MUST respond to retransmission of the client's final flight with a retransmit of its ACK.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：when in the FINISHED state, the server MUST respond to retransmission of the client's final flight with a retransmit of its ACK. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: all other flights
results.change_action: must be sent
results.standard_evidence: All other flights MUST be ACKed.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：All other flights MUST be ACKed. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: during the handshake
results.change_action: must only cover the current outstanding flight
results.standard_evidence: During the handshake, ACKs only cover the current outstanding flight
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：During the handshake, ACKs only cover the current outstanding flight 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: flights are not implicitly acknowledged
results.change_action: must be ACKed
results.standard_evidence: In general, flights MUST be ACKed unless they are implicitly acknowledged.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：In general, flights MUST be ACKed unless they are implicitly acknowledged. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: for flights implicitly acknowledged by receipt of the next flight
results.change_action: should not be sent unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately
results.standard_evidence: ACKs SHOULD NOT be sent for these flights unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：ACKs SHOULD NOT be sent for these flights unless the responding flight cannot be generated immediately. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: for post-handshake messages and for each received and processed handshake record
results.change_action: should be sent once
results.new_value: one ACK per received and processed handshake record
results.standard_evidence: For post-handshake messages, ACKs SHOULD be sent once for each received and processed handshake record
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：For post-handshake messages, ACKs SHOULD be sent once for each received and processed handshake record 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: handshake messages are discarded because they are not the next expected message
results.change_action: must not be sent
results.standard_evidence: implementations MUST NOT send ACKs for handshake messages which they discard because they are not the next expected message.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：implementations MUST NOT send ACKs for handshake messages which they discard because they are not the next expected message. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: if space is limited
results.change_action: should favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged
results.standard_evidence: if space is limited, implementations SHOULD favor including records which have not yet been acknowledged.
results.comment: ACK 列表有容量上限并能避免溢出，但满列表时直接丢弃新记录，没有记录“已经被 ACK 过”的状态，也没有优先保留未确认记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：ACK 空间受限时 SHOULD favor records which have not yet been acknowledged。代码：Dtls13RtxAddAck 在 seenRecordsCount 达到 DTLS13_ACK_MAX_RECORDS 或插入位置超过上限时直接 return 0，并注释为 silently drop/list full。测试：test_dtls13_ack_overflow 验证 one over limit 会被静默丢弃。结论为部分满足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 7.1 要求 ACK record 空间允许时尽量包含可容纳的 received packets；空间受限时 SHOULD favor records which have not yet been acknowledged。
results.code_check: 复核 Dtls13RtxAddAck：列表满时在 742-747 直接 return 0；按插入位置计算 count 后若 count >= DTLS13_MAX_ACK_RECORDS 也直接 return 0。代码没有保存“已经向对端 ACK 过”的记录状态，也没有替换已确认记录以保留未确认记录。
results.test_check: 运行 unit.test.exe -test_dtls13_ack_overflow。测试通过并验证 one over limit 时 Dtls13RtxAddAck 返回 0 且 seenRecordsCount 保持 DTLS13_ACK_MAX_RECORDS，即新记录被静默丢弃；该行为证明有容量保护，但不证明也不实现未确认记录优先级。
results.decision_reason: 实现满足 ACK 列表排序、去重和容量保护，但缺少 RFC SHOULD 的优先级策略，因此确认为部分满足。

results.change_condition: if the first byte is ack(proposed, 26)
results.change_action: must equal
results.standard_evidence: *  If the first byte is alert(21), handshake(22), or ack(proposed,      26), the record MUST be interpreted as a DTLSPlaintext record.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：*  If the first byte is alert(21), handshake(22), or ack(proposed,      26), the record MUST be interpreted as a DTLSPlaintext record. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: in general when constructing an ACK record and space permits
results.change_action: should ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record
results.new_value: as many received packets as can fit
results.standard_evidence: implementations SHOULD ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：implementations SHOULD ACK as many received packets as can fit into the ACK record 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: post-handshake
results.change_action: may cover more than one flight
results.standard_evidence: and MAY cover more than one flight.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：and MAY cover more than one flight. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: record cannot be deprotected
results.change_action: must not be sent for that record
results.standard_evidence: ACKs MUST NOT be sent for records of any content type other than handshake or for records which cannot be deprotected.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：ACKs MUST NOT be sent for records of any content type other than handshake or for records which cannot be deprotected. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: records contain messages discarded because a previous copy has been received
results.change_action: may still be covered
results.standard_evidence: This includes records containing messages which are discarded because a previous copy has been received.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：This includes records containing messages which are discarded because a previous copy has been received. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: records containing handshake messages or fragments have not been processed or buffered
results.change_action: must not be present
results.standard_evidence: Implementations MUST NOT acknowledge records containing handshake messages or fragments which have not been processed or buffered.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Implementations MUST NOT acknowledge records containing handshake messages or fragments which have not been processed or buffered. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: server ACK would otherwise cover both ClientHello and the client's Certificate message
results.change_action: must not cover both because they are in different flights
results.standard_evidence: an ACK from the server would not cover both the ClientHello and the client's Certificate message, because the ClientHello and client Certificate are in different flights.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：an ACK from the server would not cover both the ClientHello and the client's Certificate message, because the ClientHello and client Certificate are in different flights. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: upon receiving the start of the next flight
results.change_action: clear covered ACK list
results.standard_evidence: Implementations can accomplish this by clearing their ACK list upon receiving the start of the next flight.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Implementations can accomplish this by clearing their ACK list upon receiving the start of the next flight. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: when an implementation detects a disruption in the receipt of the current incoming flight
results.change_action: should generate an ACK covering the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far
results.new_value: ACK covering received and processed messages from current incoming flight
results.standard_evidence: it SHOULD generate an ACK that covers the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：it SHOULD generate an ACK that covers the messages from that flight which it has received and processed so far. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: when explicit ACKs are sent for a complete received flight that will eventually also be implicitly acknowledged
results.change_action: may acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one
results.new_value: each transmission of each flight or the most recent one
results.standard_evidence: Implementations MAY acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 ACK 发送、解析、重传队列和记录号编码路径覆盖该要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Implementations MAY acknowledge the records corresponding to each transmission of each flight or simply acknowledge the most recent one. 标准语义是对 ACK 的发送、覆盖或处理施加约束；代码在 Dtls13RecordRecvd、Dtls13RtxAddAck、Dtls13WriteAckMessage、DoDtls13Ack 和 SendDtls13Ack 路径中保存记录号、编码 ACK 列表、处理收到的 ACK 并触发剩余重传。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: when parsing DTLSHandshake
results.change_action: selected from offered list
results.new_value: select (msg_type) { case client_hello: ClientHello; case server_hello: ServerHello; case end_of_early_data: EndOfEarlyData; case encrypted_extensions: EncryptedExtensions; case certificate_request: CertificateRequest; case certificate: Certificate; case certificate_verify: CertificateVerify; case finished: Finished; case new_session_ticket: NewSessionTicket; case key_update: KeyUpdate; case request_connection_id: RequestConnectionId; case new_connection_id: NewConnectionId; }
results.comment: 常规 TLS 1.3/DTLS 1.3 握手消息被分派处理，但 RFC 9147 DTLSHandshake 中的 request_connection_id 和 new_connection_id 分支不存在。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DTLSHandshake body select 需要覆盖 client_hello、server_hello、certificate、finished、key_update 以及 request_connection_id/new_connection_id。代码的 HandShakeType 和 DoTls13HandShakeMsgType 覆盖常规 TLS 1.3 消息，但没有 request_connection_id/new_connection_id 枚举或处理分支；CID 代码仅处理 connection_id extension 和统一头 CID。结论为部分满足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 DTLSHandshake body select 显式包含 request_connection_id: RequestConnectionId 和 new_connection_id: NewConnectionId，同时包含常规 TLS 1.3 握手消息。
results.code_check: 复核 HandShakeType 和 DoTls13HandShakeMsgType：wolfSSL 覆盖 client_hello/server_hello/certificate_request/certificate/finished/session_ticket/key_update 等常规消息，但枚举和 switch 中没有 request_connection_id/new_connection_id。CID 代码只在 extension/unified header 层处理静态 CID。
results.test_check: 运行 dynamic CID 符号检查，源码/测试中未发现 request_connection_id、new_connection_id、cid_immediate、cid_spare 等符号；同时运行静态 CID built-in 测试通过，说明已实现的是静态 CID，不是 DTLSHandshake 动态 CID 消息。
results.decision_reason: DTLSHandshake 常规分支已实现，动态 CID 消息分支缺失，因此确认为部分满足。

results.change_condition: server's post-handshake CertificateRequest
results.change_action: implicitly acknowledged by receipt of the next flight
results.standard_evidence: The server's post-handshake CertificateRequest.
results.comment: post-handshake CertificateRequest 处理后即将发送的认证 flight 会隐式确认该记录，代码会移除当前 ACK。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：server post-handshake CertificateRequest 由下一 flight 隐式确认。代码在 handShakeDone 且收到 certificate_request 时调用 Dtls13RtxRemoveCurAck，注释说明由即将发送的 certificate/certificate_verify/finished flight 隐式 ACK。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: If no CID is negotiated
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails
results.new_value: records containing a CID must be rejected
results.standard_evidence: If no CID is negotiated, then the receiver MUST reject any records it receives that contain a CID.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持协商后的静态 Connection ID，并在 DTLS 1.3 unified header 中添加、解析和校验 C bit/CID；未协商 CID 时会拒绝带 CID 的记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：If no CID is negotiated, then the receiver MUST reject any records it receives that contain a CID. 代码的 Dtls13AddCID 在发送 unified header 时写入 TX CID，Dtls13UnifiedHeaderParseCID 在收到 C bit 时检查是否启用 CID 和 CID 是否匹配，未协商或缺失/不匹配时返回 DTLS_CID_ERROR。该结论限于 wolfSSL 已支持的静态 connection_id extension；动态 CID 更新另在相关条目记录为缺失。

results.change_condition: If usage is set to "cid_immediate"
results.change_action: must be used immediately
results.new_value: one of the new CIDs used for all future records
results.standard_evidence: If usage is set to "cid_immediate", then one of the new CIDs MUST be used immediately for all future records.
results.comment: 未实现 NewConnectionId/usage=cid_immediate，因此没有收到新 CID 后立即用于未来所有记录的路径。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：If usage is set to "cid_immediate", then one of the new CIDs MUST be used immediately for all future records. 标准语义依赖 RFC 9147 动态 CID 更新消息。代码：wolfSSL 仅有 TLSX_ConnectionID_Use/Parse 的静态 connection_id extension 和 wolfSSL_dtls_cid_set API；该 API 在已有 rx CID 后明确不支持连接中变更 CID。全文符号搜索未发现 request_connection_id、new_connection_id、cid_immediate、cid_spare。结论为不满足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9 要求当 NewConnectionId.usage 为 cid_immediate 时，接收端必须立即使用一个新 CID 处理所有 future records。
results.code_check: 复核 TLSX_ConnectionID_Use/Parse、wolfSSL_dtls_cid_set、Dtls13AddCID 和 Dtls13UnifiedHeaderParseCID：实现只有握手 extension 协商出的单个静态 TX/RX CID，wolfSSL_dtls_cid_set 在 rx 已存在时返回失败并说明不支持连接中更改 CID。
results.test_check: dynamic CID 符号检查无 NewConnectionId/cid_immediate；built-in CID 测试只覆盖静态 CID 存在和解析，没有可触发 cid_immediate 的消息处理入口。
results.decision_reason: 没有 NewConnectionId 消息和 usage 字段处理，因此无法满足 cid_immediate 立即切换要求。

results.change_condition: More spare CIDs are received than desired to maintain
results.change_action: may discard extra CIDs
results.standard_evidence: Implementations which receive more spare CIDs than they wish to maintain MAY simply discard any extra CIDs.
results.comment: 未实现 spare CID 列表，因此不存在维护或丢弃多余 spare CID 的接收路径。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Implementations which receive more spare CIDs than they wish to maintain MAY simply discard any extra CIDs. 标准语义依赖 RFC 9147 动态 CID 更新消息。代码：wolfSSL 仅有 TLSX_ConnectionID_Use/Parse 的静态 connection_id extension 和 wolfSSL_dtls_cid_set API；该 API 在已有 rx CID 后明确不支持连接中变更 CID。全文符号搜索未发现 request_connection_id、new_connection_id、cid_immediate、cid_spare。结论为不满足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9 允许实现收到超过希望维护数量的 spare CIDs 时丢弃多余 CID；该语义建立在接收 NewConnectionId/cid_spare 并维护 spare CID 集合之上。
results.code_check: 复核 CID 数据结构和 API：wolfSSL 只有当前 tx/rx CID 指针，没有 spare CID 列表、容量策略或 extra spare CID 丢弃路径。
results.test_check: dynamic CID 符号检查无 cid_spare/spare CID 相关处理；静态 CID 测试通过但不涉及 spare CID 队列。
results.decision_reason: 由于 spare CID 特性本身缺失，相关丢弃策略也不存在，因此确认为不满足。

results.change_condition: Receiver-provided CIDs are used
results.change_action: selected in provided order
results.new_value: used in the order they were provided
results.standard_evidence: Endpoints SHOULD use receiver-provided CIDs in the order they were provided.
results.comment: 未实现 receiver-provided CID 队列，因此没有按提供顺序选择新 CID 的路径。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Endpoints SHOULD use receiver-provided CIDs in the order they were provided. 标准语义依赖 RFC 9147 动态 CID 更新消息。代码：wolfSSL 仅有 TLSX_ConnectionID_Use/Parse 的静态 connection_id extension 和 wolfSSL_dtls_cid_set API；该 API 在已有 rx CID 后明确不支持连接中变更 CID。全文符号搜索未发现 request_connection_id、new_connection_id、cid_immediate、cid_spare。结论为不满足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9 建议 endpoints SHOULD use receiver-provided CIDs in the order they were provided。
results.code_check: 复核 CID 实现未发现 receiver-provided CID 队列；仅有当前 tx/rx CID，且连接中变更 CID 被拒绝。
results.test_check: dynamic CID 符号检查未发现 NewConnectionId 或相关队列/usage 枚举；built-in CID 测试只证明固定 CID 在记录中出现。
results.decision_reason: 没有多个 receiver-provided CIDs 的存储和选择机制，无法按提供顺序使用，因此确认为不满足。

results.change_condition: if a Connection ID is negotiated
results.change_action: must be present
results.standard_evidence: If a Connection ID is negotiated, then it MUST be contained in all datagrams.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持协商后的静态 Connection ID，并在 DTLS 1.3 unified header 中添加、解析和校验 C bit/CID；未协商 CID 时会拒绝带 CID 的记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：If a Connection ID is negotiated, then it MUST be contained in all datagrams. 代码的 Dtls13AddCID 在发送 unified header 时写入 TX CID，Dtls13UnifiedHeaderParseCID 在收到 C bit 时检查是否启用 CID 和 CID 是否匹配，未协商或缺失/不匹配时返回 DTLS_CID_ERROR。该结论限于 wolfSSL 已支持的静态 connection_id extension；动态 CID 更新另在相关条目记录为缺失。

results.change_condition: if the Connection ID is present
results.change_action: must be present
results.standard_evidence: C:  The C bit (0x10) is set if the Connection ID is present.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持协商后的静态 Connection ID，并在 DTLS 1.3 unified header 中添加、解析和校验 C bit/CID；未协商 CID 时会拒绝带 CID 的记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：C:  The C bit (0x10) is set if the Connection ID is present. 代码的 Dtls13AddCID 在发送 unified header 时写入 TX CID，Dtls13UnifiedHeaderParseCID 在收到 C bit 时检查是否启用 CID 和 CID 是否匹配，未协商或缺失/不匹配时返回 DTLS_CID_ERROR。该结论限于 wolfSSL 已支持的静态 connection_id extension；动态 CID 更新另在相关条目记录为缺失。

results.change_condition: if the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails
results.standard_evidence: If the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records, the rest of the datagram MUST be discarded.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持协商后的静态 Connection ID，并在 DTLS 1.3 unified header 中添加、解析和校验 C bit/CID；未协商 CID 时会拒绝带 CID 的记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：If the second or later record has a connection ID which does not correspond to the same association used for previous records, the rest of the datagram MUST be discarded. 代码的 Dtls13AddCID 在发送 unified header 时写入 TX CID，Dtls13UnifiedHeaderParseCID 在收到 C bit 时检查是否启用 CID 和 CID 是否匹配，未协商或缺失/不匹配时返回 DTLS_CID_ERROR。该结论限于 wolfSSL 已支持的静态 connection_id extension；动态 CID 更新另在相关条目记录为缺失。

results.change_condition: for future cipher suites not based on AES or ChaCha20
results.change_action: must be present / must be absent
results.new_value: must define their own record sequence number encryption to be used with DTLS
results.standard_evidence: Future cipher suites, which are not based on AES or ChaCha20, MUST define their own record sequence number encryption in order to be used with DTLS.
results.comment: 该条约束是对未来非 AES/ChaCha20 DTLS cipher suite 规范的注册要求，不是当前 wolfSSL 运行时必须实现的具体套件行为。
results.comparison_summary: 要求针对 future cipher suites。wolfSSL 当前记录号掩码实现覆盖 AES-GCM/AES-CCM 和 ChaCha，其他算法返回 NOT_COMPILED_IN。由于本条要求未来套件规范定义自己的记录号加密方式，当前实现没有可执行义务。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello
results.change_action: must be selected from allowed set
results.standard_evidence: cipher_suites:  Same as for TLS 1.3; only suites with DTLS-OK=Y may be used.
results.comment: wolfSSL 对 DTLS 1.3 当前支持的 AEAD 套件使用 AES/ChaCha 记录号保护，并实现发送/失败 AEAD 限制检查。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：cipher_suites:  Same as for TLS 1.3; only suites with DTLS-OK=Y may be used. 代码中 Dtls13GetRnMask 覆盖 AES-GCM/AES-CCM/ChaCha；CheckTLS13AEADSendLimit 和 Dtls13CheckAEADFailLimit 使用 RFC 9147 DTLS AEAD 限值常量。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: any TLS cipher suite specified for use with DTLS
results.change_action: must define limits on use
results.new_value: define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity
results.standard_evidence: Any TLS cipher suite that is specified for use with DTLS MUST define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity
results.comment: wolfSSL 对 DTLS 1.3 当前支持的 AEAD 套件使用 AES/ChaCha 记录号保护，并实现发送/失败 AEAD 限制检查。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：Any TLS cipher suite that is specified for use with DTLS MUST define limits on the use of the associated AEAD function that preserves margins for both confidentiality and integrity 代码中 Dtls13GetRnMask 覆盖 AES-GCM/AES-CCM/ChaCha；CheckTLS13AEADSendLimit 和 Dtls13CheckAEADFailLimit 使用 RFC 9147 DTLS AEAD 限值常量。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: when the client receives HelloRetryRequest containing a cookie
results.change_action: must send a new message with cookie added as an extension
results.new_value: new ClientHello with the cookie added as an extension
results.standard_evidence: The client MUST send a new ClientHello with the cookie added as an extension.
results.comment: wolfSSL 解析 HRR cookie，重启握手哈希并在后续 ClientHello 中写入 cookie/key_share 等扩展。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：收到带 cookie 的 HelloRetryRequest 后，客户端必须发送包含 cookie extension 的新 ClientHello。代码在 TLSX_Cookie_Parse/TLSX_Cookie_Use 中保存 HRR cookie，DoTls13ServerHello 将状态推进到 SERVER_HELLO_RETRY_REQUEST_COMPLETE，后续 ClientHello 构造通过 TLSX 写出扩展。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: content types in the reserved range
results.change_action: validated range check
results.new_value: must not be allocated in range 32-63
results.standard_evidence: IANA has reserved the content type range 32-63 so that content types in this range are not allocated.
results.comment: 该条是 IANA 保留范围分配规则，不是 wolfSSL 对端输入处理的直接义务；运行时未知 ContentType 会被拒绝。
results.comparison_summary: 要求是 IANA 不应分配 32-63 content type。wolfSSL 运行时枚举已知类型并在未知 record type 时返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE；IANA 分配治理本身不由实现执行。

results.change_condition: DCT == 21
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Alert demultiplexing after decryption
results.standard_evidence: DCT == 21 -+--> Alert
results.comment: TLS 1.3 解密后根据内层 content type 分派到 alert、handshake、application_data 或 ack；未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DCT == 21 -+--> Alert 代码在 DoProcessReply 解密后使用 ssl->curRL.type switch 分派；ack 进入 DoDtls13Ack，unknown/default 返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 22
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for DTLSHandshake demultiplexing after decryption
results.standard_evidence: DCT == 22 -+--> DTLSHandshake
results.comment: TLS 1.3 解密后根据内层 content type 分派到 alert、handshake、application_data 或 ack；未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DCT == 22 -+--> DTLSHandshake 代码在 DoProcessReply 解密后使用 ssl->curRL.type switch 分派；ack 进入 DoDtls13Ack，unknown/default 返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 23
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Application Data demultiplexing after decryption
results.standard_evidence: DCT == 23 -+--> Application Data
results.comment: TLS 1.3 解密后根据内层 content type 分派到 alert、handshake、application_data 或 ack；未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DCT == 23 -+--> Application Data 代码在 DoProcessReply 解密后使用 ssl->curRL.type switch 分派；ack 进入 DoDtls13Ack，unknown/default 返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: DCT == 24
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for Heartbeat demultiplexing after decryption
results.standard_evidence: DCT == 24 -+--> Heartbeat
results.comment: wolfSSL 当前没有 Heartbeat content type 处理路径；该条 demux 映射只在启用/支持 Heartbeat 时适用。未知类型会被拒绝。
results.comparison_summary: RFC 图示包含 DCT==24 -> Heartbeat；wolfSSL 当前源码未提供 heartbeat ContentType/处理分支，默认路径对未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE，因此该映射对本构建不适用。

results.change_condition: DCT == 26
results.change_action: must equal mapped constant for ACK demultiplexing after decryption
results.standard_evidence: DCT == 26 -+--> ACK
results.comment: TLS 1.3 解密后根据内层 content type 分派到 alert、handshake、application_data 或 ack；未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DCT == 26 -+--> ACK 代码在 DoProcessReply 解密后使用 ssl->curRL.type switch 分派；ack 进入 DoDtls13Ack，unknown/default 返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: else
results.change_action: invalid if value check fails; error
results.standard_evidence: else ------+--> Error
results.comment: TLS 1.3 解密后根据内层 content type 分派到 alert、handshake、application_data 或 ack；未知类型返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：else ------+--> Error 代码在 DoProcessReply 解密后使用 ssl->curRL.type switch 分派；ack 进入 DoDtls13Ack，unknown/default 返回 UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: if the client does not offer early data
results.change_action: must be absent / skipped
results.standard_evidence: Note that this epoch is skipped if the client does not offer early data.
results.comment: wolfSSL 将 DTLS 1.3 epoch 1 定义为 early data，并只在 earlyData 激活时切换到 early-data epoch；否则使用当前握手/应用 epoch。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：未提供 early_data 时跳过 epoch 1。代码定义 DTLS13_EPOCH_EARLYDATA=1，发送路径只有 isEarlyData 为真时设置 epoch 1，否则保持 dtls13Epoch。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: received prior to receiving a ServerHello
results.change_action: cannot safely be acknowledged because it cannot be decrypted
results.standard_evidence: a client might receive an EncryptedExtensions message prior to receiving a ServerHello. Because it cannot decrypt the EncryptedExtensions, it cannot safely acknowledge it
results.comment: ServerHello 前遇到 unified/encrypted record 时，客户端只设置发送空 ACK 以提示重传，不会对无法解密的 EncryptedExtensions 做具体 ACK。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：ServerHello 前收到无法解密的 EncryptedExtensions 不能安全 ACK。代码在 ServerHello 完成前解析 unified header 失败时只设置 sendAcks 为空 ACK；解密失败路径 DropAndRestartProcessReply/HandleDTLSDecryptFailed，不调用 Dtls13RecordRecvd 加入 ACK 列表。结论为满足。

results.change_condition: In DTLSCiphertext
results.change_action: derived/computed from another field
results.new_value: encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure
results.standard_evidence: encrypted_record: The encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure.
results.comment: BuildTls13Message 将真实 content type 附加在明文末尾，调用 EncryptTls13 加密，并为 DTLS 1.3 添加/加密 unified ciphertext header。
results.comparison_summary: 要求：DTLSCiphertext.encrypted_record 是序列化 DTLSInnerPlaintext 的加密形式。代码先复制输入明文、附加内层 content type 和 padding，再 EncryptTls13，DTLS 1.3 下还加密记录号。结论为满足。
